description: The 'Ndrina Grande Aracri is a 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Cutro, Calabria, Italy. It operates extensively in northern Italy (Emilia-Romagna, Veneto, Lombardy) and abroad in Germany. The group is involved in drug trafficking, false invoicing, extortion targeting tourist villages, and construction fraud. It emerged in the 1980s under Nicolino Grande Aracri and has been engaged in feuds with rival families.

country_links.context: The 'ndrina developed drug trafficking routes to France.
The 'ndrina operates in Germany, developing drug trafficking routes there.
